subcodes.first_line: Say: O God! Thou art verily the Sovereign of the heavens and of the earth, and within Thy grasp are all who dwell in the kingdom of Thy Cause and Thy creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم انک انت سلطان السموات و الارض و فی قبضتک من فی ملکوت امرک و خلقک قدر
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for forgiveness
